behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the enum file, enum members (LIBRARY_PUSH/library_push), function name registryCredentialsCommand, parameter libraryPush, flag --library-push, and permission string library_push.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add but not exact line numbers or full code replacements.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_permission_passed_to_api asserts the exact literal '...(credentialsArgs.libraryPush ? ["library_push"] : [])' which forbids equivalent alternatives like using an if-statement or different spacing/quoting.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests include subprocess runs of pnpm test:ci, check:type, oxfmt, and oxlint in addition to file content checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require concrete additions (enum value, parameter, validation condition, permission literal) plus passing unit tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each requirement in instruction.md (enum, CLI arg, parameter, validation, permission) has a corresponding test.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are clearly named and each has a docstring describing the check.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output schema required.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the relevant files which is appropriate for the task domain, no line-level hints.
